title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Coursera India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Coursera India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Coursera India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Patna operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Coursera India:
Coursera India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Coursera India!
